description: RadiantDash controls the opening and closing animations of the dash menu. When this component is created, it automatically creates child slots and the components it references.

fields.CurrentScreen: The current screen this is showing.
fields.AnimationSpeed: How fast the dash should open and close. Equal to the reciprocal of the duration in seconds. (With the default value of 1.333..., opening and closing takes 0.75 seconds.)
fields.ScreenProjection: Whether this should be rendering in desktop mode.
fields.AspectRatioCompensation: How much to compensate the animation for curvature
fields.ScreenSwitchingEnabled: Whether to allow user screen switching.
fields._screensContainer: The slot to store different screens.
fields._camera: The camera being used to render the screen onto the curved surface.
fields._renderTexture: the texture to render to the curved surface.
fields._topContainer: The slot to store top elements.
fields._topMesh: The mesh to show the top elements.
fields._screenMesh: The mesh to show the screen elements.
fields._buttonsMesh: The mesh to show the button elements.
fields._topMaterial: The material to use for the top element.
fields._screenMaterial: The material to use for the screen element.
fields._buttonsMaterial: The material to use for the buttons element.
fields._overlayEffectMaterial: The material to use for an overlay effect.
fields._topBorderMaterial: The material to use for the top border.
fields._screenBorderMaterial: The material to use for the screen border.
fields._buttonsBorderMaterial: The material to use for the buttons border.
fields._renderRoot: The slot to render with the camera to create the visual for the curved screen.
fields._topRoot: The root of the top element renderable.
fields._screenRoot: The root of the screen element renderable.
fields._buttonsRoot: The root of the button element renderable.
fields._topCanvas: The UIX canvas of the top element.
fields._buttonsUIroot: The root slot of the buttons element.
fields._buttonsCanvas: The UIX canvas of the buttons element.
fields._style: The style of the particle system creating the screen animation opening and closing edge.
fields._particleColors: The color of the particles being spawned in when the dash is opening and closing.
fields._emitter: The emitter for the opening and closing animation.
fields._topCollider: The collider for the top element.
fields._screenCollider: The collider for the screens element.
fields._buttonsCollider: The collider for the buttons element.

methods.IsRenderRoot: Can be used to filter a raycast portal to only hit items that are part of the colliders under this component's render root.
